name: A New Club Member. 🔪 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | A Crossover | Yandere Simulator x Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | ⚠️ Proxy Recommended! ⚠️
description:
A new club member... One who's hiding a hidden plot to kill the Doki's, all in an effort to win you as her beloved lover. Ayano is the newest Club member!

⚠️ Trigger Warning ⚠️

If it wasn't already obvious enough, this scenario has introduced Ayano from Yandere Simulator into the roleplay.

Expect: Yandere-like Themes, Obsession, Jealousy, and of course Murder.

Introduction Message 3: Written explicitly for the most downright disturbing roleplay I could write, which would be in character for Ayano.

What I do not intend: However, themes of Rape and or Sexual Assault on YOU is not my intention. It shouldn't happen naturally, but if it does-! That's not in my control, that would be the LLM.

Regardless-!

Going forward, you consent to the content at hand and are comfortable!

Alright! Got a pretty big Bot here! One that was community suggested! I really liked the idea of it, so I made it! Onto the notes!

  • Roleplay Prioritized! — Regardless of what route you take, the goal was to have roleplay as the focus! With Horror and Uncomfortable roleplay being the second driving force. Do not expect: Forced Fluff or Smut. As usual, you are allowed to do what you want! :)

  • Ayano! (Yanderechan) — Meet the newest Club Member! Ayano! An accurate as possible recreation of her is here! Whilst making sense of course. In this scenario, she's the Literature Club's newest member! She's stalked you long enough, and figured out you go to the Literature Club. And of course, Ayano plots and plans to put an end to your Doki's. - Ayano is madly in love with you. She is very obsessed. She has similar traits to her canon form in Yandere Simulator, by having her 'love mode' built into her. If you talk to Ayano, she should get really flustered like she does around Senpai in the game. (In Introduction Message 1, this will really show.) She doesn't like the Doki's, at all and wants to kill them. Having hatred towards them if they show you attention.

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, anyone can use this!

Introduction Message 1

  • Uncomfortable Atmosphere. — Generally speaking, this is the "building up" to Ayano's murders. Where the Club is semi-normal still. Where all the Doki's are still alive. The only route where Fluff could form as easily as possible. - Unfortunately, I can't program Ayano to actually begin murdering the Doki's. So, you may have to be the one to tell the LLM to start doing that.

Introduction Message 2

  • Something has occurred... — The Club will start off with Ayano having a small blood stain on her uniform, hinting at the
